c.d: Ability to send a single message to multiple contacts simultaneously, either as individual texts or through a group chat.
Allows for personalization of messages with recipient's name or other custom fields.
Ability to schedule messages to be sent at a future date and time.
Supports two-way communication, allowing recipients to reply to messages.
Tools for managing and segmenting contacts into lists or groups.
Cost of the service, including monthly fees, per-message charges, and any additional costs for features or usage.
Whether the app supports sending both SMS (text) and MMS (multimedia) messages.
Provides data and reports on message delivery, open rates, and other metrics.
Availability on iOS, Android, Web, or other platforms.
Integrates with other business tools such as CRM, email marketing, or e-commerce platforms.
